title: May Day Overpass
description: Join us for a quick May Day overpass standout at the Rt 2 overpass on Rt 31.

title: Build Power Locally - Ward Cleanup
description: Meet us Daniels St. Park in Fitchburg and we'll get to work helping our residents clean up wherever they need us to!

title: Open Meeting - Protest Music!
description: Please join us for a lovely evening with FSU Professor DeMisty Bellinger-Delfeld to learn a little about the history of protest music.

title: SECOND SATURDAYS Standout - City Hall
description: Join us as we gather in front of Fitchburg City Hall to support democracy and the rule of law.
